name: 6pc (Set of 3) Plastic Food Storage Container Set Blue - Room Essentials™
description:
This 6-Piece (Set of 3) Plastic Food Storage Container Set from Room Essentials™ is great for storing a variety of leftovers, snacks and more. This set includes three plastic food storage containers and three blue lids — two with a capacity of three cups and one with a five-cup capacity. Plus, the pieces are all dishwasher safe on the top rack for easy cleaning.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
